### Original Description
OpenClaw before 2026.4.2 fails to normalize trailing-dot localhost hosts in remote CDP discovery responses, allowing bypass of loopback protections. Attackers can craft hostile discovery responses returning localhost. to retarget authenticated browser control toward localhost endpoints and expose browser state.", "ghsa_id": "GHSA-f5fm-9jmp-c88r", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-05-06T19:03:41Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-f5fm-9jmp-c88r", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-f5fm-9jmp-c88r"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-04-28T00:16:26Z", "published_at": "2026-04-28T00:31:41Z", "references": ["https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/security/advisories/GHSA-fh32-73r9-rgh5", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-41372", "https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/commit/9c22d636697336a6b22b0ae24798d8b8325d7828", "https://www.vulncheck.com/advisories/openclaw-loopback-protection-bypass-via-trailing-dot-localhost-in-cdp-discovery", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-f5fm-9jmp-c88r"], "repository_advisory_url": null, "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "", "summary": "Duplicate Advisory: OpenClaw: Trailing-dot localhost CDP hosts could bypass remote loopback protections", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-05-06T19:03:42Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-f5fm-9jmp-c88r", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "2026.4.2", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "openclaw"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 2026.4.2"}], "withdrawn_at": "2026-05-06T19:03:41Z"}
